topic: National AI adoption patterns and collaborative assistant use in Australia
goal: Study how geography, workforce composition, and collaboration-versus-delegation patterns shape the spread and value of AI assistants in a high-adoption country.
avoid: simple traffic reporting without behavioral interpretation
seed_questions: Why do some high-adoption regions use AI more collaboratively and less autonomously than expected?
Which occupation mixes are most likely to produce broad, diverse assistant use instead of coding-heavy concentration?

seed_definitions.name: AI usage index
seed_definitions.meaning: A population-adjusted measure of how intensively a region adopts an AI assistant relative to what its size would predict.

seed_definitions.name: collaborative AI use
seed_definitions.meaning: A pattern of work where the human keeps more decision-making control and iterates with the model instead of delegating whole tasks end to end.
